value.found_quote: In AntiGravity user settings i have enabled everywhere, where its possible that the model auto proceeds. My deny list is also empty. My problem is, it still asks for input on my side.
value.rationale: The page is a Google Antigravity forum thread discussing user settings/policy controls that govern when the model auto-proceeds, including deny lists, permission dialogs (Allow, Accept, Run), "Always run"/"Always Proceed" policies, and browser/tmp permissions. These are guardrail/policy settings within Antigravity, substantiating that Google's Antigravity has such guardrails. The thread is about a bug where they don't apply, but the existence of the policy/permission settings is clearly described. No explicit lifecycle statement, but it is presented as a current, functioning product.
